documentation.text: @notice Verifiable resume — cumulative ReputationScore per wallet.
@notice Grace after `meetingEnd` before `requestRefund` / `refundIfExpired` (time for AI audit).
@notice Trust-Calendly: company escrows native SHM to book an employee until meeting end.
@notice AI oracle: success → pay employee + ReputationScore; failure → refund company.
@notice Release escrow to employee after verified success (oracle-only).
@notice Anyone may call after grace — auto-refund to company if still unsettled.
@notice Same as `refundIfExpired` — request refund after meeting + grace if AI never settled.
